sentence.chinese: 在魯凱族的生命旅程上，有很多必經的生命祭儀。幼兒時，男孩有小肩包禮、女孩有女娃娃禮。童年之後，男孩被父親帶進男人烤小米糕活動，象徵入男人之伍，學習狩獵等勇士訓練。
sentence.ab: Ikay ki tapanianiakane ki Ngudradrekay, makalra ku sakitulrilrisiane madu ka umaumase, tualay sanakitulalakane pakela ku takatuasane kay kaumasane. Lukavavalake, kiatulalabace ku sawvalay, ku labaibay kiatulalalake, lararukudrane lukatangidrakakalane si mailuku ku rarukudrane pua ki kalatadrane ki cekele pakisupilri. Lukalavavalakenga, ku sawvalay kipaalupu si iluku ku tama ini mua ki tacapiapiane ki sawvalay si “Kiapacapi” iya, maru kiaelrenga ki lasawvalay, lailuku ku nicapiane acebe mubalriw pakisupilri ki tina ini.

sentence.chinese: 女性會使用許多備品來完成禮儀，包含：買百合花飾權、接受結親儀式、結婚時隆重的下聘儀式、結婚舞會和最後的搶婚儀式。
sentence.ab: Ku labaibay maadraadraw ku rarukudrane ku akipakilidravane ki talialaalay lakakalra ku rarukudrane mua ki cekele si kipasibengelray ku bariangalay, amani kay ku sidramadrama, makalraulraumale ki latualalake ku labaibay, tayngeane ka walangay ku thimithimi ki Bengelray ki talialaalay, lakawavala kuini ki kialidraw ka ababay, si kipasudalepe ki sakacekele, kilialiadraw iya si kaikithimithimi lusibengelray sidukipi ku bariangalay, lukirakete si kitulrevege lalridrimanga ku Bengelray pacaculrudu ku sangiragelanane ini kuini alisu.

sentence.chinese: 男生成年之後，就是學習去打獵，直到取得五頭公山豬，才能加入勇士之列，披戴獵人的英勇服飾，但是沒有買百合花飾權一樣的備品，因為你的英勇能力就是你被認可的條件。
sentence.ab: Ku sawvalay sanangilangukathabaranenga, lakaalupanenga ku akisamulane, lumalra ngulrima ku valisane, lalrikipasibelengelray ki siabengelraynga ku yaelreele ku tarapaapana ka lasawvalay, ai kaika miaki kialidraw ku rarukudrane si pamapapangalane pasibengelray kuini ki sawvalay.

sentence.chinese: 老年階段會接受子女們的祝壽，分享給其同年的老人，分享其尊榮和子女們的孝心。
sentence.ab: Lukatarudraudrangenga, ku lalalake lakelrete ku “apaungulane kuini ki tarudraudrange ka sawvalay ka ababay”, mialri rarukudrane, ai kaikadali ku rarukudrane ki kialidraw si matatualrevege ku rarukudrane.

sentence.chinese: 到了往生之時，過去有很多的禁忌儀式要遵行，而今已非過去那般，僅剩下守喪和守孝而已。
sentence.ab: Lukatuase kaumasane, maadraw ku nadruma ku kakudhane, ai kikaynga thadalraneana kudra tapapiane kidreedreme kuini lrimubalriw si kaikaamadreedrelanenga, pikayana kikay malreme amia ka lrisi ki tapanianiakane.

sentence.chinese: 今天已將新的觀念和教會信仰的堅持，增加許多別出心裁的生命禮儀，讓一個人的一生，接受家人、親戚、朋友們，意想不到的關懷和祝福。
sentence.ab: Kikaynga aruapaibunga ki siasanane pakela ki suakiwkadhane ku tapangimiane ku sakiraragadhane ki sawvalay ki ababay, lakadalame madu sidrama madu, ngualay ki makaelaela ku tatulrilrisiane ku tapanianiakane madu ikay kaumasane, pangimia turamuru kay Ngudradrekay, salrisiane turamuru.
